title: yyz's Backpack + Cobblemon GUI
description: Textures for each backpack to use alongside Cobblemon Interface!
body:
Added GUI textures for [yyz's backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/yyzs-backpack) with [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface) textures to better fit [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod aesthetics. Not much else! 

![Netherite Backpack GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3978c24cb7cf0fa3f4f522e0a38762c8b1c98fd6_0.webp)
